name: 导数
subject: math
domain_name: Unit 1-3 极限与导数 Limits & Derivatives
curriculum_points:
LEARNING OBJECTIVE
LIM-1.B
Interpret limits expressed in analytic notation.

ESSENTIAL KNOWLEDGE
LIM-1.B.1
A limit can be expressed in multiple ways, including graphically, numerically, and analytically.

LEARNING OBJECTIVE
LIM-1.A
Represent limits analytically using correct notation.

ESSENTIAL KNOWLEDGE
LIM-1.A.1
Given a function f, the limit of f(x) as x approaches c is a real number R if f(x) can be made arbitrarily close to R by taking x sufficiently close to c (but not equal to c). If the limit exists and is a real number, then the common notation is lim_{x→c} f(x) = R.

LEARNING OBJECTIVE
LIM-1.C
Estimate limits of functions.

ESSENTIAL KNOWLEDGE
LIM-1.C.2
Graphical information about a function can be used to estimate limits.
LIM-1.C.5
Numerical information can be used to estimate limits.

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「导数」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：LEARNING OBJECTIVE
LIM-1.B
Interpret limits expressed in analytic notation.

ESSENTIAL KNOWLEDGE
LIM-1.B.1
A limit can b…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：LEARNING OBJECTIVE
LIM-1.A
Represent limits analytically using correct notation.… 对理解「导数」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
